thread_policy.note: Current Codex thread tools are available, but create_thread is restricted to explicit user requests for a new or separate thread. The canonical image was generated in the current thread with the built-in image_gen tool and copied into the project path; no background thread was created.

threads.thread_title: 断航故土 北境共生兽通用角色板 v01
worker_instructions: Use available image generation capability for the assigned raster asset.
Do not redesign the existing Northern Beastfolk Alliance emblem.
Write the final confirmed PNG to the canonical output_path only.
Move retained rejected or superseded images into the sibling history directory with .v001, .v002, etc. suffixes.
Return a compact manifest of final files, history files, issues, and QC notes.
